description: Juniper Networks provides networking, security, and AI-driven network operations products, including cloud-managed Mist services and software for routing and WAN management. Its documentation covers programmatic interfaces for managing Juniper networking platforms and services.
summary: juniper.net documents multiple developer integration surfaces: Session Smart Router REST and GraphQL APIs on tenant/device-hosted Juniper endpoints, plus Juniper Mist REST API and an MCP server; all documented surfaces require authentication.
